prompt_queue.prompt: Maintenance pass for non-technical, user-facing living documentation. Review source code, UI strings, commands, configuration, tests, examples, existing docs, recent issues, and recent pull requests for documentation gaps, drift, fragmentation, and unclear user guidance. Prefer focused updates that keep existing docs aligned with current user-visible behavior: what users can do, getting started, setup, configuration, common tasks, permissions, compatibility, operational expectations, and troubleshooting. Use no_changes when existing user docs are accurate, sufficiently broad for the changed or inspected areas, and easy to navigate. When changes are needed, open one documentation pull request.
